HGSS.660.0001:
Hi! You like CLEFAIRY, too?
They’re so very cute, aren’t they?\f
I think we can be good friends!
I want to know your phone number!\f
Let’s talk about CLEFAIRY! [0200,0000]
HGSS.660.0003:
Aww... Oh well. Look for me if you want
to talk about CLEFAIRY.
HGSS.660.0004:
Won’t you give me your number?
Let’s talk about CLEFAIRY! [0200,0000]
HGSS.660.0005:
Oh, there you are!
I’ll give this to you then.\r
It’s a CLEFAIRY Poké Doll!\f
HGSS.660.0006:
Um... Well...
Is it that difficult to talk to me?\f
I mean, by phone is all right, but if
we’re this close, you don’t have to\r
stay away.\r
You can just come talk to me.
HGSS.660.0007:
[010E,0004,0000]!
It’s awful. My CLEFAIRY...\f
Huh? This is [0103,0000,0000]?\f
Oh, sorry! I was in a hurry, and I...
I have to go! Bye-bye!
HGSS.660.0008:
[010E,0004,0000]!
It’s awful. My CLEFAIRY...\f
Huh? This is [0103,0000,0000]?\f
Oh, sorry! I was in a hurry, and I...
I have to go! Bye-bye!
HGSS.660.0009:
My [0100,000A,0000]’s adorable, don’t you
think so?\f
I always sleep next to it--it’s so
fluffy and warm!\f
Oh, and we had to battle a wild
[0100,000B,0000] a while ago...\f
My CLEFAIRY came close to fainting!
Isn’t that awful?\f
I hate those nasty [0100,000B,0000]!
Bye-bye!
HGSS.660.0010:
My [0100,000A,0000]’s adorable, don’t you
think so?\f
I always sleep next to it--it’s so
fluffy and warm!\f
Oh, and we had to battle a wild
[0100,000B,0000] a while ago...\f
My CLEFAIRY got frightened, so we ran
away as fast as we could!\f
I just can’t help feeling protective of
my CLEFAIRY.\f
Bye-bye!
HGSS.660.0011:
I know this might surprise you, but
would you like to battle?\f
I’ll be waiting with CLEFAIRY on
[0104,0003,0000].
HGSS.660.0012:
What’s wrong? Can’t you visit?\f
CLEFAIRY got tired and fell asleep.
I’m not sure if I can wake it up...\f
Please hurry to [0104,0003,0000]!
HGSS.660.0013: I love dressing up my CLEFAIRY!
HGSS.660.0014:
While I was at the Goldenrod Dept.
Store recently, I found these\r
super-cute Poké Dolls!\r
I’ll give you one!\f
Come collect it on [0104,0003,0000].
HGSS.660.0015:
What’s wrong? Can’t you visit?\f
This Poké Doll is so cute, too!
Please hurry to [0104,0003,0000]!
